agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Introducing aromatic and hydrophobic substitutions at position 5 and 11 will enh

report.hypothesis: Introducing aromatic and hydrophobic substitutions at position 5 and 11 will enhance SSTR2-specific complementarity in ECL2/TM5 and TM6, while charge optimization at position 6 will disrupt off-target interactions (SSTR3/5) without compromising SSTR2 binding.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current hypothesis is updated to prioritize mutations at non-pharmacophore p

report.hypothesis: The current hypothesis is updated to prioritize mutations at non-pharmacophore positions to improve selectivity. The focus is now on disrupting off-target interactions while maintaining the native pharmacophore and cysteine constraints.

proposed_changes.rationale: To disrupt off-target interactions at conserved positions (1/2/5/6/11/12) that are likely responsible for SSTR3/SSTR5 binding, while preserving the pharmacophore FWKT(7-10) and Cys3/Cys14.
These mutations are expected to reduce conserved pocket interactions with SSTR3/SSTR5 while maintaining flexibility and solubility.
